programs.desc: Police drama series. Nick's job intrudes on his social life when news of an antiques theft interrupts a date, and Greengrass's nephew turns up with a proposition.

programs.title: Heartbeat
programs.desc: Drama series. The police are baffled by a campaign of threats against a local shopkeeper. Gina's new boyfriend is hired as pub chef.

programs.desc: Crime drama. After getting caught in a storm, Vera comes across an abandoned car with a baby inside and is forced to seek refuge at a familiar house..
